title: Freecarts
body:
![Freecarts Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6555928ef4ca0691813d307032369d59bad1a5a8_0.webp)
--- ### **Download Example Resourcepack for Freecarts :** [![Download for Java](https://img.shields.io/badge/Download-for%20Java-2BA977?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/freecarts-resourcepack) [![Download for Bedrock(GeyserMC)](https://img.shields.io/badge/Download-for%20Bedrock%20(GeyserMC)-0052CC?style=for-the-badge&logo=dropbox&logoColor=white)](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/iog6jb8penju4na396tdm/APHXAdCh4p4Q2kmFIZ4qUjM?rlkey=si7mzf9oftfkui089zhgfu13v&st=xfu8yhtj&dl=0) ---
[![Donate to the Hardware Fund on Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96a9685a12b8fe4387701c71d98e798b0ddc4854_0.webp)](https://ko-fi.com/mavencraft118)
"Another vehicle plugin, eh?" Well... yes and no! Say goodbye to rails and redstone. Go wherever your mind desires with full **WASD controls**! Just don't forget to fill your **Fuel Tank**. Wait, you actually forgot? No worries, let's just call in a **Ghast Delivery** to drop off some fuel cans! Hold on, are you the **Owner** of this car? Can you grant me **Access**? I gotta go get some food real quick... or maybe you can just share some from the car's **Inventory**? Actually, no thanks, I'll just call my own car from the **Garage**. Boom! Instantly summoned right in front of me, no matter where I am.
Nice looks, huh? It's a **Custom Model**.
Hey, why did you hit my car?! Look, you made scratches on the paint... and I *just* used the **Paint System** to make it purple! Anyways, you're paying for the **Repair Kit** I'm ordering right now!
![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/685a76f1ee6619548c3763e5e1317340885534d0_0.webp)
✨ WASD Controls - Drive minecarts using W/A/S/D keys instead of rails - Smooth acceleration and deceleration with friction physics - Configurable speeds for forward, reverse, and strafing
✨ Fuel System - Configurable fuel consumption rates, fuel costs and capacities - Fuel Stations - Place refueling stations anywhere - Fuel Cans - Portable refueling items - Fuel Delivery - Order fuel cans delivered by ghast - Low fuel warnings with action bar display
✨ Cart Upgrades - Engine (4 levels) - Increase speed - Brakes (4 levels) - Better stopping power - Nitro (4 levels) - Temporary speed boost - Storage (4 levels) - 9/18/27/36 slots inventory - Upgrade dependency tree - unlock advanced upgrades progressively
✨ Health System - Carts take damage from: Players, Mobs, Arrows, Explosions, Fall damage - Speed reduction when damaged - Repair Kits - Restore cart health to 100% - Configurable damage amount, fall damage multiplier and safe fall height
✨ Ownership & Access Controlr - Carts belong to the player who places them for the first time - Grant access to specific players - Transfer ownership - Admin override permissions - Configurable max carts per player
✨ Customization - Custom display blocks for carts - Custom cart names and name colors - Interactive map-based Customization menu - Custom Lore - custom cart item lore with multi-line and color codes support.
✨ Custom Cart Models & Resource packs - Custom model support for carts - Cart variant & Paint feature - Example Resource pack included - Don't like the example models? This plugin supports your own pack with custom cart models
✨ Garage System - Either pick the cart as item or send it to garage! - Cross-Server Garage Sync: Real-time synchronization of garage contents across network - Permission based Garage Max slots - Garage finder button - Garage Upgrade system
✨ Database Feature - SQL Support - MySQL and MariaDB with YAML ↔ SQL migration - Per Server cart inventories - HikariCP Connection Pooling: Optimized database performance and reliability - Enhanced database security with validated table prefixes
✨ Fuel Station Models (no resource pack needed) - Import custom 3D models from BDEngine - Default models included - Configurable hitbox sizes
✨ Multi-Language Support - Built-in language system - English, Tamil and German included (contact me in our discord support server to add your language!)
![Dependencies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a596ee4444e84f54515d5844cacdf61d771f8c2a_0.webp) **Required:** 1. [PacketEvents](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/packetevents-api.80279/) – For WASD controls 2. [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/) – For economy features **Optional:** 1. GeyserMC & Floodgate - for Cross-platform (i.e., Bedrock) Support ![Installation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8a091907c6027a8cb0dac50f5522a2d2317ed48_0.webp) 1. Download and install **PacketEvents** from SpigotMC 2. Download **Vault** 3. Download **FreeCarts** 4. Place the JARs in your `/plugins` folder 5. *(Optional)* Install any economy plugin for costs 6. Restart server 7. Configure `plugins/FreeCarts/config.yml` 8. Restart the server after changes ![Support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/051e31ac94165ff570a8923ef172c32be8285997_0.webp) - **Discord**: [Mavenverse](https://discord.gg/RkvtGfGEfe) - **Documentation**: [Wiki](https://github.com/HiddeNBinary/freecarts-docs/wiki) - **SpigotMC**: Leave a review with your feedback [here](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/freecarts.129907/)!
